sideWinrate.title: Attack vs Defense winrate
sideWinrate.tooltip: Percentage of rounds won while playing Attack vs Defense — useful to spot a performance imbalance between the two sides.
sideWinrate.description: Based on the {{count}} matches already opened in detail (round by round) — matches never opened in detail aren't counted.

economyStats.title: Winrate by buy type
economyStats.tooltip: Rounds classified by individual loadout value at round start: Eco (minimal buy/save), Half-buy (partial buy), and Full-buy (armor + full primary weapon) — approximate thresholds, not an official Riot rule.
economyStats.description: Based on the {{count}} matches already opened in detail (round by round) — matches never opened in detail aren't counted. Classified by individual loadout value thresholds (approximate, not an official Riot rule).

seasonComparison.title: Comparison by season
seasonComparison.description: Approximation by season (Henrik doesn't expose the exact patch per match without an extra network call per match) — based on the RR history already cached.

sessions.title: Play sessions
sessions.description: A gap of more than 2h between two matches starts a new session. Tilt compares the K/D of the session's last third to its first third (from 3 matches onward).

form.compareMyAccountsDisabled: Mark at least 2 accounts as "yours" (star button) to use this shortcut.

error.format: Expected format for every player: username#tag

initial.title: No comparison yet
initial.detail: Enter 2 to 5 Riot IDs above to compare their stats side by side.

duo.title: Duo & Squad
duo.description: Winrate with your party teammates, computed as you browse matches in History — check more matches to refine these stats.
duo.emptyMessage: Not enough data yet — open a few matches in the History tab where you were in a party to see your teammates appear here.

trustedTeammate.tooltip: Trusted teammate: volume of matches played together + winrate above a threshold.

squad.title: Squad (3 players)
squad.description: Matches where you and two specific teammates were in the same party at the same time.
squad.emptyMessage: No squad detected yet — open matches where you were in a 3-player party to see these stats appear here.

fullRoster.title: Full roster (5 players)
fullRoster.description: Complete team compositions (you + 4 teammates) already encountered several times.

rivalry.title: Rivalry
rivalry.description: Head-to-head against opponents you've faced repeatedly, accumulated as you browse matches in History.
rivalry.emptyMessage: No rival detected yet — open more matches in History to cross paths with the same opponents again.
rivalry.searchDescription: Find a Riot ID in match details already in cache, no new network call.
rivalry.searchFound_one: {{count}} match found and added to rivalry.
rivalry.searchFound_other: {{count}} matches found and added to rivalry.
rivalry.searchNotFound: No cached match with this player.
